footerText: © 2024 SnapYoga. Improve your practice, one pose at a time.

rockCollectionDesc: Collect special rocks by completing challenges and using app features!

snapYogaSubtitle: Yoga for Everyone. Your mat, your pace.
analyzeYourPoseDesc: Get AI-powered feedback on your yoga poses. Upload a video, and let our smart assistant help you improve your alignment and form.
analyzeYourPoseHelp: Ready to take your yoga journey to the next level? Click below to start analyzing your poses and unlock personalized insights.
challengesWithFriendsDesc: Explore and join monthly yoga pose challenges. Invite friends and grow your practice together!
